name: Conversational Intelligence Needs Assessment
description: Pre-solution needs assessment for conversational intelligence platforms used to define business requirements, technical requirements, integrations, customizations, sales methodology alignment, readiness, and a customer-approved Statement of Requirements prior to design and quoting.

statementTemplates.statementTemplate: The platform must support the following core capabilities in scope: {{core_capabilities_required}}.
CRM integration is required in phase 1, including support for relevant objects and data synchronization defined by the customer.
The solution must support customer-specific trackers in phase 1, including the following tracker types: {{tracker_types}}.
The solution must support scorecard functionality in phase 1 aligned to the customer's coaching and methodology requirements.
The platform must support the customer's selected sales methodology framework(s): {{desired_methodologies}}.
The platform must track methodology adherence within customer conversations using the required tracking methods: {{tracking_methods_required}}.
The platform should provide automated scoring against methodology criteria, using the following scoring tolerance target: {{auto_scoring_tolerance}}.
The methodology framework must align to CRM stages, fields, or qualification criteria where applicable.
Customer security and/or procurement review is a required dependency before purchase and implementation.
Before solution design or implementation proceeds, the customer must provide the following prerequisites: {{customer_prerequisites_before_implementation}}.

recommendations.recommendedAction: Proceed to solution design and quote once Statement of Requirements is approved.
Proceed only after open prerequisites, dependencies, or requirement gaps are resolved.
Do not proceed to design/quote until discovery gaps are closed and prerequisites are documented.

answers.why_now: Managers lack visibility into deal quality and rep adherence to MEDDPICS.
answers.current_problems_to_solve: Manual review is inconsistent and qualification is not measurable.
answers.success_90_days: Managers use scorecards weekly and reps capture stronger discovery evidence.
answers.success_6_12_months: Forecast confidence and qualification consistency measurably improve.
answers.current_state_pain_points: No consistent review process, poor visibility into methodology adoption.

methodology_elements_to_track.description: Rep identifies measurable business impact tied to the opportunity.
Rep confirms identification of the economic buyer.

answers.must_have_questions_or_criteria: Pain, metrics, decision process, and next steps must be captured by end of discovery.
answers.crm_methodology_fields: MEDDPICS completion, deal risk, next step quality

requirements.statement: The platform must support the following core capabilities in scope: transcription, summaries, action items, call scoring, manager review workflows, search transcripts.
CRM integration is required in phase 1, including support for relevant objects and data synchronization defined by the customer.
The platform must support the customer's selected sales methodology framework(s): MEDDPICS and custom internal methodology.

sections.customerGoals: Customer seeks stronger qualification consistency, better manager coaching, and improved forecast visibility.
sections.scope: Phase 1 includes enterprise AEs, sales managers, and Revenue Operations.
sections.requiredCapabilities: Required capabilities include transcription, summaries, action items, scoring, and manager review workflows.
sections.playbookMethodology: The platform must support MEDDPICS-aligned methodology tracking, scorecards, and partial team-specific variations.
sections.crmIntegrations: Salesforce integration is required in phase 1 with alignment to opportunity stages and methodology fields.
sections.customerResponsibilities: Customer must provide CRM admin resources, sample calls, methodology documentation, and field mappings prior to implementation.

generated.recommendedAction: Proceed to solution design and quote once Statement of Requirements is approved.
